# ChemFYI Embed Widget

> Embeddable ChemFYI widgets for any website. Zero dependencies, Shadow DOM isolation, 4 themes (light/dark/sepia/auto).

## Quick Start

Add to any HTML page:
- Script: <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chemfyi-embed@1/dist/embed.min.js"></script>

## Links

- Main site: https://chemfyi.com
- Widget docs: https://widget.chemfyi.com
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/chemfyi-embed
- GitHub: https://github.com/fyipedia/chemfyi-embed
- API: https://chemfyi.com/developers/

## Science FYI Widget Family

- [AlloyFYI Widget](https://widget.alloyfyi.com)
- [GemFYI Widget](https://widget.gemfyi.com)
- [StarFYI Widget](https://widget.starfyi.com)
- [MineralFYI Widget](https://widget.mineralfyi.com)

## Part of FYIPedia

Open-source developer tools ecosystem — https://fyipedia.com
